Description: Monorepo, engine, shared libs, CI/CD scaffolding.
Git as system of record; Postgres projection; reconciler; read API.
Catalog/UI, contracts, SDKs, CLI.
OIDC/SAML, roles, attribute-level access.
ChangeSets, gates, maker/checker, audit.
Generate/deploy/run medallion pipelines.
Column lineage + two-way UC sync.
Event bus, webhooks, notifications.
Docker/Helm/IaC, security, observability, DR.
GDPR, BCBS 239, retention/legal hold (post-GA).
Domain ownership; Chief Data Architect / ARB sign-off; scope-aware approval routing.

Summary: Set up monorepo workspace & task runner
Description: Establish pnpm workspaces + Turborepo + Changesets; shared tsconfig and lint with module-boundary rules.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. Workspace builds all packages
2. Boundary lint fails on illegal cross-imports
3. Changesets versioning configured

Description: House the pure engine: contract types, generators, governance checks, semver, registry.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. Engine is dependency-light and unit-tested
2. No engine dependency on HTTP/DB

Description: Typed config loader (env + file), structured JSON logger with secret/PII redaction.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. Invalid config fails fast with a clear message
2. Logs contain no secret/PII values

Description: PR pipeline: typecheck, unit, lint/boundary, SCA + secret scan, SBOM, signed image.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. CI runs on PR and blocks on failure
2. SBOM + signed image produced on main

Description: GitProvider interface with a local filesystem impl and a GitLab REST impl (read path; write path in EP05).
Acceptance Criteria:
1. readTree returns the model tree + a content sha
2. GitLab read path works against a test project

Description: Forward-only migrations for domain/model/field/version/edge + meta; each record carries source_sha.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. Migrations apply cleanly
2. Records carry source_sha

Description: Materialize the Git tree into the projection; idempotent; full rebuild from a commit.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. Re-running reconcile yields identical projection
2. Rebuild reproduces projection exactly from a sha

Description: Fastify read endpoints over the projection with FTS.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. Documented read endpoints respond
2. Search filters by facets

Description: Seed the models repo with a synthetic capital-markets domain for out-of-box exploration.
Acceptance Criteria: 1. Fresh install is explorable with seeded models

Description: Detect divergence between Git head and the projection; alert when stale.
Acceptance Criteria: 1. Out-of-band commit raises a drift alert

Description: Browse/search models & products with facets (domain, kind, status, classification, PII/MNPI, owner).
Acceptance Criteria:
1. Search returns filtered results
2. Facets work as specified

Description: Schema (with classification + PII/MNPI), versions, lineage refs, owner, contracts.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. Detail view renders all elements
2. Contracts are downloadable

Description: Expandable entities, FK connectors, classification badges, role-aware masking.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. Entities expand to attributes
2. FK connectors render between entities

Description: Generate JSON Schema/OpenAPI/JSON-LD per model + capability descriptor.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. Each artifact is retrievable and valid
2. /.well-known/dct.json is accurate

Description: Typed clients for read endpoints honoring masking.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. Both SDKs round-trip reads
2. Masking respected in SDK responses

Summary: CLI (validate, diff, propose, simulate, generate, pipeline, lineage)
Description: Operator/CI CLI wrapping engine + API.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. Each command performs its function
2. CLI usable in CI

Description: Authenticate via corporate IdP; short-lived sessions; logout.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. SSO login works
2. Sessions expire and refresh

Description: Issue scoped, hashed, revocable machine credentials.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. Keys are scoped + revocable
2. Keys hashed at rest, shown once

Description: Roles from IdP groups; capability checks on endpoints; domain scoping.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. Each role grants only its capabilities
2. Domain-scoped roles enforced

Description: Enforce tier + PII + MNPI per attribute across API, semantic, catalog.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. Masking matches the decision rule across roles
2. Masked measures are not computable

Description: Postgres RLS enforcing domain + clearance on read models.
Acceptance Criteria: 1. Direct SQL cannot bypass scoping

Summary: Admin: IdP config, role mapping, domains
Description: Admin surfaces for identity/role/domain configuration.
Acceptance Criteria: 1. Config changes take effect without code changes

Description: Proposal wrapping edits with diff/impact/gates/approvals; draft→in_review→approved→merged/rejected.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. A ChangeSet exposes diff, impact, gates, approvals
2. Invalid transitions rejected

Description: Run schema, referential, classification, semver, propagation gates on each ChangeSet.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. Each gate returns pass/fail with detail
2. Approval blocked while a required gate fails

Description: No self-approval; risk-based quorum; PII/MNPI/policy governance escalation.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. Self-approval/merge rejected
2. Quorum + escalation enforced

Description: Append-only audit with chain verifier and SIEM stream.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. Chain verifies; tampering detectable
2. Events stream to SIEM

Description: Implement the GitLab write path; merge gate re-verified server-side.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. Propose opens an MR; approved MR merges
2. Server-side gate re-verifies at merge

Description: Side-by-side diff, classification deltas, impact tree, gate status, approvals.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. Review surface renders all elements
2. Approve/reject with SoD enforced

Description: Reusable CI that runs gates on direct MRs; branch-protection templates.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. Direct MRs are gated
2. No-self-approve enforced in Git

Description: Compute downstream impact; require ack for breaking changes with subscribers.
Acceptance Criteria: 1. Impact shown; ack required to proceed

Description: Dual-admin override with reason + time-box + high-severity audit.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. Break-glass recorded distinctly + alerts
2. Single-admin attempts fail

Description: Orchestrator interface; local in-process medallion; Databricks Workflows/DLT via Asset Bundles.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. Local adapter runs the medallion in CI
2. Databricks adapter targets a workspace

Description: Idempotent deploy; on-demand/scheduled/on-merge triggers; run tracking + metrics.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. Re-deploy is a no-op for unchanged
2. Runs tracked with metrics

Description: Generate DLT expectations from DQ contracts; surface results on runs.
Acceptance Criteria: 1. DQ pass/fail appears on runs

Description: dev/staging/prod targets + promotion; distinct approver required for prod.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. Promotion deploys identical assets per target
2. Prod deploy without distinct approver rejected

Description: List pipelines, schedules, run history + run detail.
Acceptance Criteria: 1. Console shows pipelines and runs with metrics

Description: Bounded retries, circuit-breaking on poison runs, alerting.
Acceptance Criteria: 1. Repeated failures circuit-break + alert

Description: Build lineage from the models (source→bronze→silver→gold.col→semantic).
Acceptance Criteria: 1. Lineage resolves the full chain for a field

Description: Ingest run events; mark observed edges; reconcile vs static.
Acceptance Criteria: 1. Edges marked observed after a run

Description: Upstream/downstream traversal, impact analysis, interactive explorer.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. Traversal + impact correct
2. Explorer renders the graph

Description: Project models into UC: schemas, classification/PII/MNPI tags, column masks, ownership.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. Applied tags/masks match the model
2. Plan is generatable without a workspace

Description: Import existing UC estate as candidate models; detect & remediate drift.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. Import produces candidate models
2. Drift detected + remediable

Description: Domain events with an outbox; in-process subscribers.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. State-changing actions emit events
2. Outbox guarantees delivery

Description: Signed delivery with retries, dead-letter, and replay.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. Subscriber receives a signed event
2. Failures DLQ and can be replayed

Description: Subscribe to products/event types; notify subscribers before a breaking merge.
Acceptance Criteria: 1. Subscriber notified of a breaking change

Description: Adapter-based notifications for reviews, decisions, SLA breaches.
Acceptance Criteria: 1. Notifications delivered via configured channel

Description: Multi-role image (api/web/worker/all) + one-command compose stack.
Acceptance Criteria: 1. docker compose up brings up a working stack

Description: HA deployments, services, ingress, probes, secret refs, HPA.
Acceptance Criteria: 1. helm install deploys api/web/worker with probes

Description: Package the image as a Databricks App for in-perimeter deploy.
Acceptance Criteria: 1. App deploys inside a workspace

Description: IaC for the data-plane side the platform governs.
Acceptance Criteria: 1. terraform apply provisions catalogs + SP

Description: OTel traces/metrics/logs; golden-signal + domain dashboards; alert rules.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. Dashboards display the listed metrics
2. Alerts fire on threshold breach

Description: PITR backups incl. audit chain; tested restore; chaos drills.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. Restore drill passes; audit chain verified
2. Dependency-outage drill degrades gracefully

Description: Pen-test fixes, STRIDE review, egress allow-listing, image signing.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. Threat model reviewed; mitigations tracked
2. Security checklist green

Description: Guided setup; operational runbooks (drift, rotation, break-glass, restore, onboarding).
Acceptance Criteria:
1. Clean-room install < 1 hr
2. Runbooks followed in a drill

Description: Purpose/lawful-basis tags; RTBF lineage propagation; residency-constrained deploys.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. RTBF produces a target list via lineage
2. Region-tagged products deploy only to matching regions

Description: Lineage-completeness scoring; DQ evidence bundles; ownership coverage.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. Coverage metric per domain
2. Evidence bundle exports

Description: Configurable retention; WORM/legal-hold immutability; e-discovery export.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. Retention applied; held records immutable
2. Signed e-discovery export

Description: Make domains first-class; map Git paths + IdP groups to domain steward roles; every model has an owning domain.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. A model resolves its domain + steward group
2. Reviewers auto-route to the owning domain
3. Ownerless models reported

Description: Add chief_data_architect (enterprise sign-off + standards admin) and architecture_review_board (delegated quorum) roles.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. CDA can sign off any domain's enterprise change
2. ARB quorum can sign off when delegated
3. Domain stewards remain domain-scoped

Description: Add scope (domain/shared/enterprise) to the model envelope; shared/enterprise models are CDA-governed.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. Scope persists and drives routing
2. Only CDA/ARB can evolve shared/enterprise models

Description: Configurable policy computing required approvers from kind/severity/scope/classification/cross-domain; CDA sign-off for BDM/major/cross-domain/new-entity/classification/shared.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. Each trigger condition requires CDA sign-off
2. Routine in-domain change is domain-tier only
3. Policy changes without code changes
4. SoD enforced at every tier

Summary: Enterprise sign-off tier & CDA review queue
Description: Escalate qualifying ChangeSets to the CDA after domain approval; dashboard of pending enterprise sign-offs with scope/impact/gates; SLA + escalation.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. Qualifying change cannot merge without CDA sign-off
2. CDA sees all pending enterprise approvals
3. Stale sign-offs escalate per policy

Description: Enterprise modeling standards as automated gates (naming, classification, semver, cross-domain integrity); flag entities overlapping conformed models.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. Non-compliant change fails the relevant gate
2. A near-duplicate entity raises a reuse warning

Description: Record domain proposer, domain approver(s), and CDA sign-off; per-change evidence bundle of the federated chain.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. Audit shows both tiers for a governed change
2. Evidence bundle exports the full approval chain

Description: Let the CDA delegate change classes to the domain tier over time; recorded and audited.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. A delegated class no longer requires CDA sign-off
2. Delegation is audited

Description: Catalog of domains, owners, conformed/shared models, and pending sign-offs.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. Registry lists domains, owners, shared models
2. Pending enterprise sign-offs visible
